description:
Add a new external pharmacy to the NOSH ChartingSystem address book using the admin credentials (username: 'admin', password: 'Admin1234!'). The entry must include the following details:
- Name/Facility: Springfield Family Pharmacy
- Address: 1625 Main Street
- City: Springfield
- State: MA
- Zip: 01103
- Phone: 413-736-1025
- Fax: 413-736-1026
- Specialty: Pharmacy
